desc_head: Harley Schlanger moderates a discussion entitled the Strategic Crisis Facing the Human Race. Wil we have Peace through Development and Cooperation or Annihilation? Speakers include Helga Zepp-LaRouche (Founder of the Schiller Institute), Amb. Ping Huang (Council General of the Peoples Republic of China in New York), Alexey Boguslavskiy (First Secretary, Russian Federation Mission to the UN), and Dr. Bouthaina Shaaban (Political and Media Advisor to the Syrian President)

desc_head:
The participants of this discussion are members of the "Committee for the Coincidence of Opposites." Learn more about the committee and what you can do to contribute to their efforts https://bit.ly/3m5TZS1
This is excerpt is from the March 20-21 Schiller Institute international conference https://bit.ly/3cYsdTx

Statement on the Committee:
Leading citizens from many nations, including medical professionals, farmers, musicians, scientists, students, educators, clergy, civil rights leaders, community activists and others have endorsed the call issued in October 2020, by Schiller Institute chairwoman Helga Zepp-LaRouche to form The Committee for the Coincidence of Opposites to address the COVID pandemic, now coupled with an extreme famine crisis. video_title: Excerpt—Eating Is a Moral Right, A Dialogue with 6 American Farmer Leaders
desc_head:
An excerpt from Panel IV of the Schiller Institute's April 25-26, 2020 International Online Conference featuring American farm leaders speaking out against the dire situation American farmers, and therefore Americans, face due to the speculative cartelization of the global food supply. The panel's moderator is Dennis Speed. See the full conference proceedings at: https://schillerinstitute.com/blog/2020/03/29/conference-mankinds-existence-now-depends-on-the-establishment-of-a-new-paradigm/

video_title: Beethoven Mass in C Major, Op. 86 — NYC Schiller Institute Chorus and Orchestra
desc_head:
Performed November 18, 2018 at St. Bartholomew's Church, NYC
Friedrich Schiller Birthday Celebration Concert, Part Two
Watch Part One https://youtu.be/MDLPfbX921Q

In Memory of Maestro Anthony Morss, by John Sigerson, Schiller Institute
Reading from Friedrich Schiller, Dikran Tulaine
Mass in C Major, Op. 86, Schiller Institute NYC Chorus and Orchestra, John Sigerson, conductor
Indira Mahajan, Soprano
Linda Childs, Alto
Everett Suttle, Tenor
Costas Tsourakis, Bass

Performed at the Verdi Tuning C=256hz

Learn more about the concert http://www.sinycchorus.com/schiller_birthday_celebration_concert

video_title: Keynote: We can shape a new era of mankind!

See full conference proceedings here, https://schillerinstitute.com/the-future-of-humanity-as-a-creative-species/

video_title: LaRouche’s Science of Physical Economy—Key to Solving the Problems of Eurasia, Ukraine & the World
desc_head:
Natalia Vitrenko, doctor of economic sciences, Leader of the Progressive Socialist Party of Ukraine, Former Member of Parliament, Ukraine, addresses the November 16-17, 2019 International Schiller Institute conference in Bad Soden, Germany. 

The full conference is available here, https://schillerinstitute.com/the-future-of-humanity-as-a-creative-species/

video_title: Educating a New Generation with LaRouche's Discoveries
desc_head:
The potential of the individual to add to the power in the universe through creative discovery defined the example of Lyndon LaRouche's life and was the subject of a powerful presentation by Megan Beets and Jason Ross at the Schiller Institute conference November 16, 2019. They  opened with a clip of LaRouche asking, “Where does creativity lie? It does not lie in what most people think. It lies in the ability of the living individual, to create states of existence, that is the design of states of existence, to FORECAST what is going to happen. And that’s the most precious thing, for me, to grasp that! That’s everything for me! And that’s what we should hope for.”

They reviewed LaRouche’s work with the Basement team, a scientific research group initiated by LaRouche in 2006, and concluded with a discussion of how we must use the method of LaRouche to develop a new generation of creative

video_title: L'Institut Schiller lance son nouveau dossier sur les Nouvelles Routes de la soie
desc_head:
Intervention d'Odile Mojon lors de la conférence de l'Institut Schiller France du 6 novembre 2018 à Paris, date du lancement du dossier en langue française "Les Nouvelles Routes de la soie, Pont Terrestre Mondial - Pour en finir avec la géopolitique".

COMMANDEZ LE DOSSIER : http://www.institutschiller.org/Les-Nouvelles-Routes-de-la-soie-pont-terrestre-mondial.html

video_title: Le Plan en Chine, une idée neuve pour la France ?
desc_head:
Intervention de Karel Vereycken lors de la conférence de l'Institut Schiller France du 6 novembre 2018 à Paris, date du lancement du dossier en langue française "Les Nouvelles Routes de la soie, Pont Terrestre Mondial - Pour en finir avec la géopolitique".

M. Vereycken est co-auteur du dossier et conseiller sur les questions économiques.

COMMANDEZ LE DOSSIER : http://www.institutschiller.org/Les-Nouvelles-Routes-de-la-soie-pont-terrestre-mondial.html

Intervention de Sébastien Périmony lors de la conférence de l'Institut Schiller France du 6 novembre 2018 à Paris, date du lancement du dossier en langue française "Les Nouvelles Routes de la soie, Pont Terrestre Mondial - Pour en finir avec la géopolitique".

M. Périmony est co-auteur du dossier et conseiller sur les questions africaines.

COMMANDEZ LE DOSSIER : http://www.institutschiller.org/Les-Nouvelles-Routes-de-la-soie-pont-terrestre-mondial.html
